feedback.text: Hello! I think digital fairness is very important, especially as a disabled person who relies very much on the Internet as a source of information and method of survival. This includes using the Internet for entertainment, art, education, communication, etc. That is why I view recent Internet developments as highly worrying. Actors such as VISA blocking storefronts with content they view as risky is far beyond their scope as a payment processor. Studios making games reliant on online servers only to then take those away when the game stops being profitable is also worrying. I would therefore like to suggest taking these two situations into account when formatting the digital fairness act, as I, as a disabled EU citizen, am forced to rely on the goodwill of large companies in order to carry out my everyday life.
